title: Roasted Vegetable Skillet
description: A hearty skillet dish featuring roasted vegetables and a crispy crust. Perfect for any meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced red pepper, onion, zucchini, and eggplant. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium and add the minced garlic. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Sprinkle the skillet seasoning over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and roast at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
